title: HU8 8DL: Cargill plc: permit surrender issued - EPR/ZP3931YU/S004
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Cargill plc Installation name: Hull Mill Permit number: EPR/ZP3931YU/S004  "
